purpose: Constrain the LLM-owned PRD reading pass before interaction-model generation. This artifact proves the model has extracted source mechanisms, interfaces, flows, states, risks, and AI pending questions before Figma rendering.

rules.llmOwned: LLM reads the PRD/wiki/DOCX/PDF and writes this artifact; code validates coverage and structure.
rules.evidenceRequired: Every item must include source evidence or a precise source-derived rationale.
rules.noRendererGeometry: Do not include Figma coordinates, template slots, or renderer layout decisions.
rules.noThinSummary: Do not replace mechanism/interface/flow/state/risk lists with a high-level feature summary.
